title: Zelensky Renews Demands for Defense Systems Ahead of Trump Meeting at NATO Summit
summary_full: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine is urging European states to sell him Patriot missiles to defend against Russian attacks and has asked President Trump to let Ukraine make the Patriot systems.
summary_public: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine is urging European states to sell him Patriot missiles to defend against Russian attacks and has asked President Trump to let Ukraine make the Patriot systems.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Zelensky...urging European states to sell him Patriot missiles
